name: WF-006 Storing Detectie (FaultBits)

nodes.name: Webhook — MonsterMQ FaultBits
nodes._comment: Configure in MonsterMQ: Flow → on topic idp/plc02/fault_bits where value != 0 → HTTP POST http://n8n:5678/webhook/fault/plc02

parameters.name: text

_comment: Bit decoding: 1=infeed_conveyor, 2=labeler, 4=sealer, 8=vision. Combinaties: 3=infeed+labeler, 5=infeed+sealer, etc. Vereist: TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL env var.
